org.springframework.data.redis.core.ReactiveZSetOperations

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.

  • Uses of ReactiveZSetOperations in org.springframework.data.redis.core

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReactiveZSetOperations<K,V>
    ReactiveRedisOperations.opsForZSet()
    Returns the operations performed on zset values (also known as sorted sets).
    <K,V> ReactiveZSetOperations<K,V>
    ReactiveRedisOperations.opsForZSet(RedisSerializationContext<K,V> serializationContext)
    Returns the operations performed on zset values (also known as sorted sets) given a RedisSerializationContext.
